location: A common (2%) drop from sword-and-shield Skeleton enemies and shield-wielding Beast Skeletons found in several spots; the most reliable single farm is the Church of the Plague in Caelid, where roughly seven skeletons cluster across the graveyard and nearby arches.
tactics: Church of the Plague is scab-covered ground crawling with Caelid's rot/scarlet-rot enemies — approach carefully and clear skeletons in small groups rather than pulling the whole graveyard.

Other viable farm spots include the road between Saintsbridge and Summonwater Village Outskirts (Liurnia) and southeast of Hermit Merchant's Shack (Altus Plateau), useful if you're passing through those regions instead.
Skeletons here reassemble after being killed unless finished with a Sacred-affinity or holy weapon, or by destroying nearby bone piles.
lore: A battered shield of honor bearing the image of a sun-crowned city — a faded relic of a 'Seat of the Sun' that no longer exists.

builds.name: Budget Strength build
builds.why: Cheap-to-farm 92%-block Strength shield, solid filler pick for a low-level Strength or Quality build passing through Caelid.
